content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

I found a single high-confidence gap: this change set does not include any runtime implementation edits for the requested lifecycle robustness work, so those behaviors remain unaddressed by this patch.

## Amendments

1. The patch is metadata-only and does not implement the requested run-lifecycle hardening contract in runtime code. The only file-level changes are in `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson` (new `reviewer_started` entries at lines 113-114) and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json` (added `stage_resolution_snapshot`/metadata under `active_run` at lines 16-37), while the behavior files required by the goal (`src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`) are untouched by this diff.
   Rationale: This violates the change request’s acceptance criteria: process-liveness tracking, `run stop`, stale `run status`, automatic stale resume recovery, and SIGTERM handling are operational behaviors and require code updates, not only run-state journal/snapshot metadata edits.
